title: AgentManifestSchema
description: JSON Schema defining canonical structure for the .agent/agent.md YAML front matter.

protocol_version.description: Version of the Portable Agent Protocol (PAP) used by this agent.

min_runtime_version.description: Minimum required version of the runtime engine to execute this agent.

version.description: Semantic version of the agent configuration.

purpose.description: High-level goal or role description of the agent.

description.description: Detailed explanation of the agent's responsibilities and behavior.

language.description: Primary language of interaction and logs (e.g., 'zh-TW', 'en').

authorization_level.description: Security permission level required for execution.

use_case_tags.description: Semantic tags describing target applications and use-cases.

tools.description: Manifest declaring list of tools accessible to this agent.
